SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN DEL BIANCO. DEFENDANT BREONNA BROWN DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT SUZZANE GARDNER DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED TIMELY FOR DEFENDANT BREONNA BROWN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SUZZANE GARDNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL BIANCO, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, BREONNA $9,520.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,670.00, SUZZANE GARDNER DIMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $267.58 ACCRUED INTEREST, $105.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, BREONNA

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR (SC-225)DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS [X] THE COURT WILL MAKE ORDERS ON THE MATTER AFTER A HEARING SET FOR `` HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE HEARING SET FOR A PAYMENT PLAN OF JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $9881.36 FILED BY BREONNA BROWN IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JOHN DEL BIANCO IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BREONNA BROWN VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SUZANNE GARDENER WAS DISMISSED FROM THIS CASE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR BREONNA BROWN WILL MAKE PAYMENTS DUE ON THE 2ND OF EACH MONTH OF $150 FOR 65 MONTHS, THE 66TH MONTH WILL BE THE FINAL PAYMENT OF 131.36, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF OCT-2-2026. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO BREONNA BROWN RETURNED: INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
